content.en:
Lord Yunlan was also very annoyed, but her strength was not as good as that of a person, and she didn't dare to trouble Blood Wolf Tianzun now.

Blood Wolf Tianzun is only afraid of her father's Tianzun friends now, so he won't kill her, but it doesn't mean that he doesn't dare to kill her.

If she dared to provoke the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable, maybe she would really let the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable be a killer.

Now, the temporary members she recruited have been poached, and she can only endure it.

Suddenly, she noticed that Ye Tian hadn't gone to the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, and asked with some curiosity, "Lord Fatian, why don't you leave the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group?"

"It's easy for me to join a large Mist Mercenary Group, but I think the Cloud Mist Mercenary Group is very pleasing to the eye, so I joined. Could it be that the Yunlan Juggernaut wants to drive me away?" Ye Tiandao.

"Of course not, the Fa Heavenly Lord is willing to stay, how can we possibly drive away!"

Lord Yunlan hurriedly explained.

The people of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group did not linger here, but entered the Mist area.

Although a few cosmic gods have gone, for the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, the loss of strength is not big, because Ye Tian is still there, and one master is far more extreme than a group of cosmic gods.

Wow!

Ye Tian followed Master Yunlan and the others into the mist area, and immediately felt the suppression of divine consciousness and soul power by the mist area.

"It's really strange, my strength is comparable to a fourth-rank supreme, but my divine consciousness and soul will also be suppressed by the misty region, I really don't know what secrets the mist region has?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Life Heavenly Pupil!"

He opened this ability, which is a special ability possessed by the seventh-order life level, which can sense the life breath of other creatures, and the sensing range is far beyond the range of divine sense, at the beginning, he was able to sense the life breath of other source beasts from a long distance in the origin realm.

It can be said that the Life Heavenly Pupil is the biggest means of Ye Tian's exploration, and there is no one.

Buzz Buzz !!!

In an area, countless life breaths emerged, a small part of which were the life breaths of cultivators who entered, and the vast majority of them were misty beasts' life breaths.

"The ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil has also been suppressed, but the scope of exploration is still very vast, according to the division of the mist area, I not only probed the life breath of the outer area, but even explored part of the inner area!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed in his heart, in this way, his safety in the misty area would be greatly guaranteed.

It can even be said that with the help of the Life Heavenly Pupil and the Constant Light Divine Power, he can enter the core area and break through.

After everyone from the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group entered the Mist Area, except for Ye Tian, everyone else was very dignified.

At the same time, everyone also opened the array, forming a defensive formation that moved freely to prevent the attack of the misty beast.

Although the Misty Region is in the Chaotic Sea, after actually entering the Misty Region, it is not on the sea, but on a piece of land.

Because of this strangeness, the Misty Region is thought to be in another dimension, not in the main dimension.

But no one knows what the truth is in the Misty Zone.

In the general dimension, the Supremes are expected to break it, but the mist area is very special, and the First Divine Lord can't break the blockade, so he can only fly out honestly.

"There's a misty beast coming!"

Ye Tian noticed it through the Life Heavenly Pupil ability, but he didn't remind Yun Lan to dominate them.

If he had reminded him, he wouldn't be able to explain why he had been able to spot the misty beasts in the distance?

Besides, this misty beast is not very strong, so it is only comparable to the weaker master.

Rumble!!!

The Mist Beast slammed into the defensive formation, attracting the attention of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Regiment.

"Everyone be careful, there are misty beasts!" Yun Lan dominated the transmission.

Although she could see that this misty beast was not strong, she didn't dare to take it lightly, who knew if there were other misty beasts nearby.

In the Fog Zone, the consequence of arrogance is death.

So, she wouldn't underestimate any of the Mist Beasts.

"Ice Bird Magical Power, go!"

With a finger of Yunlan's dominant hand, a huge ice bird appeared out of thin air and slaughtered the misty beast.

The speed of this misty beast is very fast, but the cultivation of the Yunlan master is the ultimate master, the misty beast is just fast in attack, but once it is discovered, it is not difficult for the Yunlan master to capture the traces of this misty beast.

In addition, the Ice Bird Divine Power can cast an ice effect on a large scale, which is enough to freeze the Mist Beast.

Rumble!!!

The cold air released by the Ice Bird filled the area, instantly freezing the Mist Beast.

Then, Yun Lan Juggernaut slashed over with a sword, directly slashing the misty beast into pieces.

But after the death of the Mistbeast, it left behind a crystal.

"This is the beast crystal after the death of the misty beast, the beast crystal has the effect of enhancing the strength of the soul, and it is also one of the rare resources of the Chaos Sea!"

Yun Lan said, and put away this misty beast crystal.

After all, it was this misty beast that she killed, and she collected the beast crystal, and no one would object.

The group moved on.

Along the way, many mist beasts attacked, and some mist beasts even made Yunlan Juggernaut helpless but to retreat.

Fortunately, they were lucky, and they also found some rare elixirs, ores, etc., which were of great value.

But they still haven't discovered a treasure that can raise the Chaos level cultivation talent to a mixed level cultivation talent.

"There is a mountain peak here, there are no misty beasts on it, everyone consumes a lot of divine power, rest here for a while and recover your divine power!" Yunlan Juggernaut proposed.

"Good!"

Everyone nodded, and immediately went up the mountain and began to rest.

But even when they were resting, they still turned on their defensive formations, and even took turns guarding to prevent a misty beast from attacking.

Time passed little by little, and a few hours later, Ye Tian suddenly frowned.

"Someone's coming this way!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Through the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil and the talent of time and space, he saw a group of people, who were none other than those of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group.

The direction they are heading in is exactly the side of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group, if it is a coincidence, it is unlikely, it is not easy to identify the direction in the misty area, and it is not a coincidence to move forward in a straight line and go straight to this side.

"It's strange, how could the people of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group know that the Cloud Dream Mist Mercenary Group is here, I'm sure that the Blood Wolf Tianzun didn't leave a soul mark on the Cloud Dream Mist Mercenary Group and the others. Then there is only one possibility, there are traitors!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If there is a traitor, as long as he carries a special sensing device, the Blood Wolf Tianzun can find him through the sensing device.

Ye Tian's divine sense glanced around and found that there was something wrong with the face of a cosmic god, as if he was expecting something, and he was struggling a little.

"This man should be a traitor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's a pity that Lord Yunlan and the others haven't found out yet.

Ye Tian didn't panic at all, a mere Blood Wolf Tianzun was undoubtedly an ant to him, if the Blood Wolf Tianzun dared to make a move, he wouldn't mind killing him.
